audit_traces.check: HEAD is the declared exact commit and the DKR changed no tracked or cached product file
audit_traces.threshold: HEAD 7bf966e66b914cfe877ff5ee8d1990ca3bf3d162 and both product diff exits 0
audit_traces.value: HEAD 7bf966e66b914cfe877ff5ee8d1990ca3bf3d162; tracked product diff 0; cached product diff 0
audit_traces.replay: git rev-parse HEAD; git diff --quiet -- . ':(exclude).okra'; git diff --cached --quiet -- . ':(exclude).okra'

audit_traces.check: The manifest contains exactly 39 Lite rows and 8 Lite React rows and only hz and p75 metrics
The deterministic harness passes 14 of 14 tests with 0 failures and collects no benchmark sample
evidence: The replay invoked harness.test.mjs and no record or capture command

audit_traces.check: The manifest lacks scope.run, session.run, owned-resource, and retained-memory workload rows and lacks allocation and retained-memory measurement rows or observation fields
audit_traces.threshold: 0 matching workload rows, 0 allocation measurement metrics, 0 retained measurement metrics, 0 measurement fields
audit_traces.value: 0 matching workload rows, 0 allocation measurement metrics, 0 retained measurement metrics, 0 measurement fields
audit_traces.replay: jq workload-name, metric-kind, allocation-name, and recursive measurement-field audit of benchmarks/lite-perf/rows.json
evidence: The existing object literal allocation row uses metric hz; it is an allocation-named throughput exercise, not an allocation measurement row

audit_traces.check: No executable allocation or retained-memory measurement checker is available
audit_traces.threshold: 0 checker paths, 0 checker-content matches, 0 package-script matches
audit_traces.value: 0 checker paths, 0 checker-content matches, 0 package-script matches
audit_traces.source_of_truth: Repository filesystem excluding .git, .okra, node_modules, and dist; all package.json scripts
audit_traces.replay: Fresh deterministic filesystem, checker-content, and package-script audit for allocation sampling, retained-memory, heap-profile, and heap-snapshot measurement checkers
evidence: This accepts only the absence fact; it does not accept either proposed measurement design

audit_traces.check: Lite and Lite React dist artifacts are ignored, predate exact HEAD, and lack a tracked exact-head clean-build provenance record
audit_traces.threshold: Both files ignored, both mtimes before HEAD commit time, tracked dist file count 0
audit_traces.value: Both files ignored, both mtimes before HEAD commit time, tracked dist file count 0
audit_traces.replay: git show HEAD timestamp; git check-ignore; stat both dist files; git ls-files both dist trees

acceptance_boundary.replay: jq explicit hypothesis-status, result-advance, wall-advance, improvement-claim, and fail-closed fields

summary.unaccepted_scope: Measurement designs, exact missing-row set, candidate ranking and risk, baseline process, performance claim, CKR performance advance, and optimization advance
